headlines.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump’s push to end birthright citizenship
headlines.description: President Trump is slamming a Supreme Court decision that blocked his attempt to end automatic citizenship for the children of undocumented immigrants born in the U.S. NBC News’ Laura Jarrett reports.

headlines.title: Supreme Court strikes down long-standing campaign finance restrictions
headlines.description: The provision challenged by Vice President JD Vance and others limits how much party committees can spend in coordination with individual candidates.

headlines.title: Supreme Court upholds transgender bans in girls’ and women’s sports
headlines.description: Delivering another blow to LGBTQ rights, the court ruled against two students who had challenged restrictive laws in West Virginia and Idaho.

headlines.title: Democratic socialist Melat Kiros unseats Rep. Diana DeGette in Colorado House primary
headlines.description: NBC News projects that Kiros, 29, defeated DeGette, who has been in Congress for three decades, in the latest victory for the insurgent left this primary season.

headlines.title: Victor Willis, Village People lead singer, dies aged 74
headlines.description: Victor Willis, 74, the lead singer of the 1970’s disco-group Village People, has died, his team said Wednesday.

headlines.title: Trump reports more than $1 billion in income from crypto ventures in financial disclosure
headlines.description: In a financial disclosure from 2025, President Trump reported more than $1 billion in income from cryptocurrency ventures and meme coins. President Trump also announced that the Republican Party will hold a midterm convention in Dallas, Texas. NBC News' Gabe Gutierrez reports.

headlines.title: Raúl Jiménez aparece y consigue el segundo gol para México sobre Ecuador
headlines.description: El ‘Lobo’ mexicano aprovechó un gran pase de Julián Quiñones y definió en el área frente a Galíndez, poniendo el 2-0 de México sobre Ecuador, en un arranque soñado del ‘Tricolor’ en los dieciseisavos de la Copa del Mundo.

headlines.title: World Cup goals are way up. Is the ball to blame?
headlines.description: The 2026 World Cup has already seen the most goals scored in the history of the tournament.

headlines.title: Venezuela’s huge needs are not being met by earthquake response, group warns
headlines.description: The response to Venezuela’s devastating twin earthquakes has not met the huge need created by the disaster, according to a leading international humanitarian organization.

headlines.title: From The Sports Desk: Japan, Germany and Netherlands eliminated in roller-coaster day
headlines.description: Brazil came from behind to beat Japan 2-1 with a winner in the sixth minute of injury time and two European powerhouses crashed out in penalty shootouts in a roller-coaster day of elimination action.

headlines.title: México elimina a Ecuador y firma una noche histórica para avanzar a octavos
headlines.description: México hizo historia en el Estadio Azteca. Con goles de Raúl Jiménez y Julián Quiñones, derrotó 2-0 a Ecuador, avanzó a octavos de final, ganó un duelo de eliminación mundialista por primera vez en 40 años y sigue sin recibir un solo gol en el torneo.

headlines.title: Las reacciones de Julián Quiñones tras su gran partido con México ante Ecuador
headlines.description: El delantero firmó un gol y una asistencia en la victoria de 2-0 sobre Ecuador, siendo el mejor del partido. La ‘Pantera’ agradeció a sus compañeros y al cuerpo técnico, así como a la afición por todo el respaldo que ha tenido durante la Copa del Mundo.
